title: Energy Audit Planning Tools
summary: ASHRAE provides free templates for planning energy audits.

title: Audit Conduct Sequence
summary: The audit process includes a preliminary walkthrough, safety meeting, equipment checks, data collection, interviews, and documentation.

structured_payload.sequence_steps: Preliminary Walkthrough, SAFETY toolbox meeting, Equipment Checks, Data Collection, Interviews, Documentation

evidence_quote: Preliminary Walkthrough SAFETY toolbox meeting Equipment Checks Data Collection Interviews Documentation

title: Audit Data Analysis Tools
summary: Data analysis for audits utilizes RETScreen, Excel, and ASHRAE forms.
